element.short: Medical aid or personal medical device
element.definition: A type of a manufactured device that is used in the provision of healthcare without being substantially changed through that activity. The device must be a medical device.
Reference to a DeviceDefinition resource that describes the technical and functional details of the medical aid.

element.short: Date and time of expiry of this medical aid (if applicable)
element.definition: The date and time beyond which this medical aid is no longer valid or should not be used (if applicable).

element.short: Serial number of the medical aid
element.definition: The serial number that uniquely identifies the medical aid instance.
The name of the medical aid as given by the manufacturer and listed in the device registry.

element.short: Model number of the medical aid
element.definition: The model number of the medical aid.
